overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit streets at night. The character traverses wet sidewalks, crosses intersections with yellow crosswalks, and passes under an elevated highway overpass with vibrant holographic advertisements and cyberpunk architecture throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with vendor stalls

events.description: approaching the yellow crosswalk at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the red sidewalk past vendor stalls and neon signs

notable_agents.action: vendor tending to a stall with colorful magazine covers displayed
pedestrian in white jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large green holographic projection of a woman's face on a building facade
green vending machine with holographic human figures displayed on the front
street stall with colorful magazine and book covers displayed on racks
green metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit street in Night City. The character walks along a red-tiled sidewalk bordered by a green metal railing, passing a vendor stall with colorful magazines. A large green holographic face looms in the distance on a building facade, while the camera follows the character past a green vending machine toward an upcoming intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with yellow crosswalk and commercial plaza

events.description: stepping onto the yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the street
yellow taxi drives past on the street while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk amidst a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving along the street parallel to the crosswalk
group of pedestrians crossing the street together in the same direction

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and red borders
commercial building with large illuminated blue FOURTHWALL signage
pedestrian traffic signal showing white walk symbol

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wide yellow crosswalk, transitioning from the narrow sidewalk to the open intersection. The FOURTHWALL building dominates the view ahead with its bright blue signage, while a yellow taxi passes by on the left. The camera follows the character through the moderate crowd of pedestrians crossing the street together.

scene_state.functional_zone: quieter commercial sidewalk with benches and building wall

events.description: turning right at the corner to continue down the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a tall beige building wall with benches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown suit walking ahead along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall plain beige wall with triangular architectural indentations
row of empty benches lined up against the building wall
rectangular planters with green bushes and vegetation

segments.scene_description: Leaving the busy intersection behind, the character walks along a quieter sidewalk bordered by a tall beige building wall. Empty benches and planter boxes line the right side of the path. The camera follows as the character approaches and turns the corner, with the green holographic face billboard still visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with large mural

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the elevated highway overpass
approaching large colorful demon mural painted on the wall

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass past a vibrant mural and industrial pipes

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark coat walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: elevated highway structure overhead with concrete support columns
large vibrant street art mural of a demonic face with horns on green wall
large orange industrial ventilation pipes running along the building wall
white sedan parked along the curb under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, sheltered area beneath an elevated highway overpass. The environment shifts to a more industrial aesthetic with large orange pipes and a striking colorful demon mural painted on the right wall. A white car is parked along the left curb. The camera continues to follow the character as they walk through this covered walkway toward the distant street lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant neon district that gradually transitions into a sheltered industrial underpass. It begins on a wet, red-tiled sidewalk where the character passes a vendor stall and a green vending machine under the gaze of a massive green holographic face. As the character steps onto a wide yellow crosswalk, the scene opens into a busy intersection dominated by the bright blue signage of the FOURTHWALL building and the movement of a yellow taxi. The camera then follows the character away from the crowd and along a quieter path bordered by a beige wall and empty benches before turning a corner. Finally, the environment shifts into a darker, covered walkway beneath an elevated highway overpass, passing large orange pipes and a colorful demon mural toward the distant street lights.
